name: Patina
description: Weathered copper blooming green — verdigris spreads in soft pools over the metal, advancing differently with each redraw.

code.style: --verd: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --oxide: @rand(0.25, 0.45); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(44%, 80%); left: @rand(-6%, 28%); top: @rand(-6%, 28%); border-radius: @rand(34%, 66%) @rand(34%, 66%) @rand(34%, 66%) @rand(34%, 66%); background: var(--verd); opacity: @rand(0.35, 0.8); filter: blur(calc(10px / @Y)); transition: ease 900ms; } } @random(0.3) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(14%, 26%); left: @rand(50%, 70%); top: @rand(50%, 70%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color4); opacity: var(--oxide); filter: blur(calc(6px / @Y)); transition: ease 900ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
